carousel.label: Base Carousel
carousel.description: Generic scrollable carousel. Wraps arbitrary child blocks in a responsive horizontal scroller with optional navigation arrows and hint.

slots.name: blocks
slots.description: Container holding one or more carousel items (any block element).

attrs.name: mobile-hint
attrs.description: Show a swipe hint on mobile.

attrs.name: tablet-size
attrs.description: Visible items per view on tablet.

attrs.name: desktop-size
attrs.description: Visible items per view on desktop.

attrs.name: tablet-count
attrs.description: Total item count used for tablet sizing calculations.

attrs.name: desktop-count
attrs.description: Total item count used for desktop sizing calculations.

carousel.notes: Use this when none of the specialized carousels fit. For card grids use carousel-cards; for image galleries use carousel-image / carousel-multiple-image.

carousel-cards.label: Card Carousel
carousel-cards.description: Carousel specialized for umd-element-card children. Supports an intro block (headline + text + actions) above the card track.

slots.name: headline
slots.description: Section headline above the carousel. Functionally required — omitting it leaves the dark carousel without context.

carousel-cards.children_expected: umd-element-card-overlay instances (preferred — image-driven content fits the dark texture). umd-element-card with data-theme="dark" is also valid when cards have substantive body copy.
carousel-cards.notes: Always include slot="headline" — without it the dark carousel renders without context. A umd-text-line-trailing section eyebrow can be placed in a horizontal wrapper directly above the component in the page flow (no eyebrow slot exists on the component itself). See RULES.md §27.

carousel-image.label: Single Image Carousel
carousel-image.description: Displays one image at a time with optional per-image headline and caption.

slots.name: images
slots.description: Container with img elements (alt text required).

slots.name: headlines
slots.description: Per-image headlines (div elements, one per image).

carousel-image.notes: Alt text is enforced — missing alt will log a warning.

carousel-multiple-image.label: Multi-Image Gallery Carousel
carousel-multiple-image.description: Gallery-style carousel showing multiple images per frame. No caption/headline slots.

slots.name: images
slots.description: Container with multiple img elements (alt text required).

carousel-image-wide.label: Wide / Featured Image Carousel
carousel-image-wide.description: Full-width hero carousel with slide previews. Slides use data-attributes for metadata (no slot children per caption).

slots.name: slides
slots.description: Container with figure or div slides. Inner structure: img + [data-headline] + [data-text].

attrs.name: title
attrs.description: Accessible carousel title. Default: 'Animated Image Carousel'.

carousel-thumbnail.label: Thumbnail Carousel
carousel-thumbnail.description: Carousel with a thumbnail navigation strip. Each slide supplies its thumbnail via a `data-thumbnail` attribute.

slots.name: blocks
slots.description: Slides with data-thumbnail attributes pointing to a thumbnail image URL.
